response.justification: The candidate has extensive software engineering experience, but his background is heavily focused on full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang) rather than C++ and industrial automation. He lacks recent and deep experience in C++, STL, and industrial IoT protocols, and does not mention the specific cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) required for this role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience with strong foundations in agile methodologies, TDD, and CI/CD.
Proven architectural skills in designing distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven architectures.
Possesses the advantageous skills in React, Node.js, and cloud platforms mentioned in the job description.
concerns: Severe lack of recent or extensive C++ and STL experience, which is the core technical requirement for this position.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or manufacturing environments.
Missing required expertise in Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity standards.
